codeReview.summary: Pass. The fix commit resolves the prior blocking encrypted-PDF issues from processing-and-password, preview-viewer-highlights, and download-done-flow: PasswordModal is now mounted at App level (reachable during LOADING), DropScreen detection uses global password-prompt wiring, DocumentViewer reloads encrypted PDFs via stored password callback, and FooterBar passes password callback through redactDocument for download/redaction.

summary: Reviewed fix transcript skeleton plus original failed diffs (45ddb55, 6f1e3769e302c8e4426ed0fe8464a474a2f05ef7, da51717) against fix diff 6a40346a5ef22268044e2e530778451818e2c1d5. The fix adequately addresses all previously blocking password-flow regressions across detection, preview reload, and redaction/download paths, with supporting regression tests and no new high-confidence blocking or non-blocking issues identified.
